title: New (Pivoting) Board as a Board View

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I create a lot of boards to generate content based on Primary boards, acting as pivot boards.

Examples:
a) Board A receives thousands of responses from a form. Board B categorizes the responses based on Board B name column (based on a column from Board A) via workflows.
b) Board A is used to list, mark, and label various financial transactions. Board B is used to categorize all the transactions based on Month & Year (Board B name column, based on a column from Board A). Board C is used to categorize all the transaction based on reason for transaction (Board C name column, based on a column in Board A). Board C also takes the information from Board B to create planning vs committed vs actual board.

Having the ability to create board views that essentially work as useable pivot boards or rearrange what I want to see in name column vs other columns would help tremendously instead of having to create new boards and create automations/workflows to make sure everything goes in, and then triple-check that everything actually went in the correct place.
